source_pr.title: executor: make analyze test be stable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: guo-shaoge <shaoge1994@163.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25191 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: case unstable.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: Make `TestAnalyzeSamplingWorkPanic` be serial. Otherwise it may affects other cases.

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests : None, just fix case

Side effects: None


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
